title: Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful North African stew made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and a blend of sweet and tangy flavors.

ingredients.name: Algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at North African markets or online

ingredients.name: Piquant sauce
ingredients.notes: A mixture of lemon juice, garlic, and spices

ingredients.name: Tagine broth
ingredients.notes: Available at North African markets or online

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 10 minutes.
Add the Algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the piquant sauce, tagine broth, and lamb stock. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and cilantro, and accompanied by crusty bread.
